reviews.review_description: No option for new log in just log on … unless I missed something
Great problem for all ages. Love the assessment and gamified experience.

This sounds awesome and like a great program 

 but it doesn't even go to the start screen it goes to the login so you have to log in on separate device and you can't even preview it without paying the startup cost which is $50 just for a month so not going to risk without even knowing what it's like

reviews.review_title: Locked up first time I tried it.
reviews.review_description: Downloaded this tonight- it zipped past the purchase screen and brought me to the log in page. Don’t have a log in yet. Stuck at the log in screen. Glitchy!

It's hard to train your eyes, brain, and body to work together without going out and practicing sports for hours on end.  Mastermind lets you specifically target those core skills like hand-eye coordination and reaction times that are the foundation of almost every sport and to do it at home without needing a coach or teammates.  Especially great for my kids who are just developing these skills and can improve so quickly.   This stuff has been proven with NFL quarterbacks and baseball players so happy to have an option for amateurs.
Brain capability is such an important thing to focus on and Mastermind does an amazing job!  After using it for a bit I can feel and see the difference in my everyday life.
So many different cognitive training exercises, challenging and fun. Definitely a legitimate cognitive workout!
I've been training with Mastermind for the last 5 months and I have noticeably improved my tennis game to the point where my training partners have commented on it.

developer_response.body: Hi, and thanks for asking! Please send us an email at support@mastermindtraining.com and we would be happy to assist you through the process.

reviews.review_description: I have a met quest three and I downloaded mastermind cognitive training and it won’t let me join anything. It will only let me do practice mode or when I put in my information it says there’s no active account. What am I doing??￼
